name: thinksound
description: Generate contextual audio from video using step-by-step reasoning🎶

cfg_scale.description: Classifier-free guidance scale. Higher values follow conditioning more closely but may reduce creativity
cfg_scale.title: Cfg Scale

cot.description: Chain-of-Thought description providing detailed reasoning about the desired audio (optional)
cot.title: Cot

num_inference_steps.description: Number of diffusion denoising steps. More steps = higher quality but slower generation
num_inference_steps.title: Num Inference Steps

seed.description: Random seed for reproducible outputs. Leave empty for random seed
seed.title: Seed
